name: José Miguel Fernández
headline: Software Engineer | Systems, Product Delivery, Architecture, Automation
tagline: Software engineer focused on resilient systems, product delivery, technical clarity and modern execution.
focus: Systems engineering, product delivery, technical architecture and platform reliability
availability: Open to product-focused roles, technical collaborations and selected build engagements.
summary: I build systems that need to stay reliable under change, remain clear to evolve, and help teams move product work forward without losing technical control.

My core is still strong in backend engineering, distributed systems and platform work, but I also contribute across architecture, automation, internal tooling and pragmatic product execution when that creates more leverage.

focusAreas.title: Platform Architecture
focusAreas.description: Service boundaries, API design, security and technical decisions that keep products understandable as they evolve.

focusAreas.title: Modernization and Delivery
focusAreas.description: Migration paths, release confidence and delivery workflows for systems that need to improve without losing operational trust.

focusAreas.title: Internal Tooling and Automation
focusAreas.description: Operational tooling, workflow automation and pragmatic product support that remove friction for teams and systems.

focusAreas.title: Distributed and Realtime Systems
focusAreas.description: Systems that communicate reliably, scale predictably and remain observable in production.

experience.description: Contributing to the development and maintenance of large-scale cloud-native backend systems for The Workshop, working with cross-functional teams in an agile, security-critical environment.
highlights: Develop and maintain backend services in Java and Spring Boot, following clean architecture principles, DDD and strong maintainability standards.
Design and implement REST APIs and internal integrations with an emphasis on reliability, testability and production observability.
Work with RabbitMQ and asynchronous communication patterns to support reliable integrations in distributed systems.
Collaborate with SRE and Platform on Kubernetes-based deployments, Grafana and Kibana observability, automated health checks and operational consistency.
Strengthen CI/CD pipelines through automated testing, security controls, artifact versioning and more robust deployment workflows.
Diagnose and resolve incidents in distributed systems with a focus on performance, resilience and maintainability.

experience.description: Grew from trainee to senior developer while contributing to the design, development and evolution of large-scale education platforms serving multiple international markets.
highlights: Designed and implemented a Docker-based infrastructure that improved environment consistency, scalability and team productivity.
Contributed to deployment and delivery improvements, supporting more efficient and reliable release flows.
Led the transformation toward a multi-language, multi-portal platform that enabled international expansion.
Integrated payment systems and built advanced search with Elasticsearch, improving result quality and user experience.
Improved platform performance, scalability and Core Web Vitals, with positive impact on SEO and engagement.
Developed and maintained backend and frontend features with PHP, Phalcon, JavaScript, HTML and CSS, while also reinforcing code review and development standards.

education.degree: Master's Degree in Web and Mobile Technologies Programming
education.description: Graduate program focused on web and mobile development, application architecture and digital product delivery.

education.degree: Higher Technician in Cross-Platform Application Development
education.description: Advanced technical training in software development across platforms, covering Java, databases, testing, version control and application architecture.

certifications.name: Master Microservices with Spring Boot, Docker and Kubernetes

company.title: Microservices Modernization Platform
company.context: International backend team modernizing a cloud platform for a product organization operating at enterprise scale.
company.summary: Platform modernization work centered on service boundaries, secure APIs, database delivery workflows and release confidence during the transition away from a legacy monolith.
highlights: Contributed to a long-term migration from a Scala monolith to a cleaner and more maintainable service architecture.
Improved release confidence through secure service work, automated database delivery and contract testing.
Supported a product platform where technical clarity mattered as much as feature progress.

company.title: Euroinnova International Education Platform
company.context: Core digital product used to capture, convert and serve educational demand across multiple markets.
company.summary: Large-scale product work across backend, frontend and infrastructure, focused on performance, business delivery and maintainable platform evolution.
highlights: Worked on lead generation, search, payment and UX-critical flows with direct product impact.
Helped evolve the platform toward a multi-language, multi-portal structure for international growth.
Balanced performance, maintainability and business delivery across a high-traffic digital product.

company.title: EduCash Affiliate Platform
company.context: Affiliate management product supporting operational reporting, partner workflows and payment-related processes.
company.summary: End-to-end delivery of an internal digital product used to manage affiliate relationships, reporting flows and operational processes tied to growth channels.
highlights: Built the product from implementation through ongoing iteration and operational adoption.
Delivered reporting, partner workflows and internal operations tooling connected to business processes.
Balanced practical usability with the realities of product, operations and growth.

personal.title: CV Studio
personal.context: A professional CV builder designed for technical profiles with live editing, strong data modeling and polished PDF output.
personal.summary: A product build around structured CV data, live editing and document generation. The focus was not just interface quality, but modeling, validation and delivery of a clear end-user workflow.

imgHover.alt: CV Studio live preview and PDF export

highlights: Built a real-time editor with synchronized preview over structured JSON data and reusable templates.
Implemented ATS-friendly PDF export with a strong focus on layout consistency and document quality.
Combined product polish with typed validation and document-generation architecture.
